description: Claude Flow hooks configuration — uses stdin-jq-xargs pattern to prevent shell-injection when tool inputs contain quotes / redirects / special chars (#1747). Hook subcommands run via scripts/ruflo-hook.sh (#1921).
_security_note: All commands read the hook payload from stdin (Claude Code passes a JSON object), extract fields with jq, and pass them to the CLI as a single argv element via xargs -0. This bypasses shell re-parsing entirely. DO NOT inline $TOOL_INPUT_* / $PROMPT / $TOOL_NAME directly in a quoted command string — interpolation is not shell-safe (creates empty files at CWD when input contains '>' redirects).
_resilience_note: #1921 — hook subcommands invoke scripts/ruflo-hook.sh (resilient shim): prefers a locally-installed `ruflo`/`claude-flow` binary, falls back to `npx --prefer-offline`, always exits 0. The trailing `|| true` on each pipeline guards the case where $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unset. DO NOT revert to a bare `npx <pkg>@alpha hooks …` per fire.
_platform_note: #2132 — This hooks.json uses /bin/bash, POSIX pipelines (jq, xargs, tr), and .sh scripts. It is intentionally POSIX-only (Mac/Linux) today and known-broken on native Windows (#2721 shape). The previous claim here that `ruflo init` overrides these entries with node-based equivalents on Windows was never actually implemented and is incorrect — Claude Code merges plugin-declared hooks additively with any init-generated settings.json, it does not replace them. This package (separate from plugins/ruflo-core, which got the #2721 fix) still needs its own Windows-compatible rewrite; see _legacy_unaudited_shim below.
_legacy_unaudited_shim_note: #2721 fixed plugins/ruflo-core and plugins/ruflo-cost-tracker (marketplace-listed in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json) by rewiring hooks.json to a `node -e` bootstrap around scripts/ruflo-hook.cjs. This older, separately-published "claude-flow" plugin package (not in the ruflo marketplace list) has its own, larger jq/xargs-based hook set and its own scripts/ruflo-hook.cjs that hooks.json never references — same underlying bug shape, NOT fixed as part of #2721. Needs its own audited pass before this flag can be removed.

hooks.command: cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" pre-edit --file '{}' || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" pre-command --command '{}' || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_input.description // empty | .[:200]' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" pre-task --description '{}' || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_input.pattern // .tool_input.query // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" pre-search --query '{}' || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_name // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" mcp-pre --tool '{}' || true

PostToolUse.description: Post-edit hook for formatting and learning

hooks.command: cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" post-edit --file '{}' --train-patterns || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" post-command --command '{}' --track-metrics true --store-results true || true

cat | jq -r '.tool_response.agent_id // .tool_response.task_id // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" post-task --task-id '{}' --analyze-performance || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_input.pattern // .tool_input.query // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" post-search --query '{}' --cache-results || true
cat | jq -r '.tool_name // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" mcp-post --tool '{}' || true
cat | jq -r '.prompt // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" route --task '{}' --include-explanation || true
cat | jq -r '.session_id // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" session-start --session-id '{}' --load-context || true

hooks.prompt: Evaluate if the current task has been completed successfully. Consider: 1) Were all requested changes made? 2) Did tests pass? 3) Is there follow-up work needed? Respond with {"decision": "stop"} if complete, or {"decision": "continue", "reason": "..."} if more work is needed.

SubagentStop.description: Evaluate if subagent task is complete

hooks.prompt: Evaluate if the subagent has completed its assigned task. Check if the work output meets the requirements. Respond with {"decision": "stop"} if complete, or {"decision": "continue", "reason": "..."} if more work is needed.

hooks.command: cat | jq -r '.message // empty' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -I {} "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ruflo-hook.sh" notify --message '{}' --swarm-status || true

v3HookMapping._comment: Maps V3 internal hook events to official Claude Code hooks
